document_name.label: Document Name
document_name.description: The name of the contract document.

parties.label: Parties
parties.risk_explanation: Standard clause. Risk only if parties are misidentified.

agreement_date.label: Agreement Date
agreement_date.description: The date of the contract execution.
agreement_date.risk_explanation: Low risk unless backdating is implied.

effective_date.label: Effective Date
effective_date.description: The date the contract becomes effective.
effective_date.risk_explanation: Note if effective date differs from signing date.

expiration_date.label: Expiration Date
expiration_date.risk_explanation: Check if expiration triggers auto-renewal or penalties.

renewal_term.label: Renewal Term
renewal_term.description: Terms governing automatic or manual contract renewal.
renewal_term.risk_explanation: Auto-renewal clauses can create unintended multi-year commitments. Verify opt-out windows and notice requirements.

notice_period_to_terminate_renewal.label: Notice Period to Terminate Renewal
notice_period_to_terminate_renewal.description: Time required to give notice of non-renewal.
notice_period_to_terminate_renewal.risk_explanation: Short notice windows (< 30 days) are high risk. Missing the window locks you into another term.

governing_law.label: Governing Law
governing_law.description: The jurisdiction whose laws govern the contract.
governing_law.risk_explanation: Unfavorable jurisdiction (e.g., foreign courts) may increase litigation costs.

dispute_resolution.label: Dispute Resolution
dispute_resolution.risk_explanation: Mandatory arbitration clauses may waive jury trial rights.

anti_assignment.label: Anti-Assignment
anti_assignment.description: Restrictions on assigning contract rights to third parties.
anti_assignment.risk_explanation: Broad anti-assignment clauses can block M&A transactions or corporate restructuring.

ip_ownership_assignment.label: IP Ownership / Assignment
ip_ownership_assignment.description: Provisions governing ownership of intellectual property created under the contract.
ip_ownership_assignment.risk_explanation: Work-for-hire and broad IP assignment clauses can transfer valuable IP rights to counterparty.

license_grant.label: License Grant
license_grant.description: Rights granted to use intellectual property.
license_grant.risk_explanation: Scope limitations (field-of-use, territory, sublicensing) can restrict business operations.

non_compete.label: Non-Compete
non_compete.risk_explanation: Overbroad non-compete clauses can severely limit future business opportunities. Check scope, geography, and duration.

exclusivity.label: Exclusivity
exclusivity.description: Provisions restricting dealings with competitors or third parties.
exclusivity.risk_explanation: Exclusivity locks in a single vendor/partner and eliminates leverage in future negotiations.

no_solicitation.label: No-Solicitation
no_solicitation.description: Restrictions on soliciting employees or customers.
no_solicitation.risk_explanation: Can limit talent acquisition and sales activities post-contract.

non_disparagement.label: Non-Disparagement
non_disparagement.description: Provisions prohibiting negative statements about counterparty.
non_disparagement.risk_explanation: May restrict whistleblower activities or legitimate criticism.

limitation_of_liability.label: Limitation of Liability
limitation_of_liability.description: Caps on the amount of damages recoverable.
limitation_of_liability.risk_explanation: Liability caps that are too low leave you undercompensated for major breaches. Caps significantly below contract value are red flags.

liquidated_damages.label: Liquidated Damages
liquidated_damages.risk_explanation: Verify amounts are reasonable and proportionate. Punitive amounts may be unenforceable.

warranty_duration.label: Warranty Duration
warranty_duration.risk_explanation: Short warranty windows may leave you without recourse for defects discovered later.

insurance.label: Insurance
insurance.risk_explanation: Verify required coverage amounts are achievable and cost-effective.

audit_rights.label: Audit Rights
audit_rights.description: Rights to audit counterparty's books and records.
audit_rights.risk_explanation: Lack of audit rights in revenue-sharing or royalty agreements is a significant risk.

most_favored_nation.label: Most Favored Nation
most_favored_nation.description: Guarantee of receiving the best terms offered to any party.
most_favored_nation.risk_explanation: MFN clauses can be costly if you offer better terms to other customers/vendors.

cap_on_liability.label: Cap on Liability
cap_on_liability.risk_explanation: Critically evaluate whether the cap adequately covers your exposure. Common red flag: cap set at contract fees paid.

indemnification.label: Indemnification
indemnification.description: Obligation to compensate the other party for losses.
indemnification.risk_explanation: Mutual vs. one-sided indemnification is key. Broad indemnification without carve-outs for gross negligence is extremely high risk.

change_of_control.label: Change of Control
change_of_control.risk_explanation: Change-of-control clauses can allow termination or price changes in M&A scenarios.

termination_for_convenience.label: Termination for Convenience
termination_for_convenience.risk_explanation: One-sided termination rights create business continuity risk. Check if mutual and what notice is required.

rofr_rofo_rofn.label: ROFR / ROFO / ROFN
rofr_rofo_rofn.description: Rights of first refusal, offer, or negotiation.
rofr_rofo_rofn.risk_explanation: These rights can delay transactions and complicate third-party dealings.

minimum_commitment.label: Minimum Commitment
minimum_commitment.risk_explanation: Unmet minimums can trigger penalties even if business needs change.

revenue_profit_sharing.label: Revenue / Profit Sharing
revenue_profit_sharing.description: Provisions for sharing revenue or profits.
revenue_profit_sharing.risk_explanation: Vague calculation methodologies can lead to disputes. Ensure clear definitions of revenue/profit.

price_restrictions.label: Price Restrictions
price_restrictions.description: Limitations on pricing or price changes.
price_restrictions.risk_explanation: Price caps or freeze clauses can impact profitability in inflationary environments.

confidentiality.label: Confidentiality / NDA
confidentiality.risk_explanation: Perpetual confidentiality obligations or overly broad definitions of confidential information increase risk.

data_breach_notification.label: Data Breach Notification
data_breach_notification.description: Requirements for notifying parties of data breaches.
data_breach_notification.risk_explanation: Tight notification windows (e.g., 24 hours) may be operationally difficult to meet and trigger penalties.
